cases.text: Erwartet: 50.000,00 EUR im Feld Kaufpreis Netto.
Verify the VAT amount shows 19.00 % after selection.
The amount field rejects 1.250,99 EUR for this unresolved rule.
The amount field validation accepts 12.345,67 EUR.
Expected validation message: "VAT rate is required".
Expected validation message: "Amount field is required".
Submit is blocked and an inline validation error is shown.
Provide an invalid VAT rate and expect a clear message.
Verify field label "Netto" and expect 45.000,00 EUR to be shown.
Check option "Brutto" and expect message "Amount field is required".
The MwSt. field displays 7,50 % and the message "must be positive".
The unresolved amount field shows 999.99 EUR after selecting Netto.
Verifiziert, dass das Label "Höhe des Kaufpreises (Netto)" sichtbar ist.
Confirm the VAT field label is visible.
Prüfe, dass die Option "Brutto" auswählbar ist.
The hint text for the amount field is displayed.
Check that the section title for Netto / Brutto is shown.
Sichtbarkeit der Feldbezeichnung "MwSt.-Satz" prüfen.
Ensure the radio option "Netto" is present.
Verify the caption for the amount field is shown.
Prüfe, dass der Hinweistext zur MwSt. vorhanden ist.
Confirm the copy for the Brutto selection is displayed.
The field name for VAT selection remains visible.
Abschnittstitel für die Netto / Brutto Kaufpreis-Erfassung ist sichtbar.
